name: Aunt E.c.'s Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Butter or margarine (softened, equivalent to 4 sticks)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan.
3. Cream butter and sugar together in a large mixing bowl until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Gradually add flour, beating until well blended.
6. Spoon the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted one inch from the edge comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before turning out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
